statement: Typed shared dropzone engine — Dropzones should be generated by view rules, not hardcoded inside components, so Kanban and Timeline drag/drop stay consistent and future-proof. — A typed dropzone model defines: view type, target type, accepted dragged object types, target ID, position, active state, edge-zone state, and the command to run on drop. Dropzones are generated by view rules. Drop actions route through named mutation commands.
affected_modules: dropzone engine; src/pages/builder/kanban/; src/pages/builder/timeline/; builder mutation commands
